scenario.title: The Contact Extractor
scenario.context: You're building an email processing system. When users forward business cards or contact information to your app, you need to extract the data into a consistent JSON format that your CRM can import.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that extracts contact information from unstructured text and outputs valid JSON with specific fields.
constraints: Must include fields: name, email, phone, company, title
Missing fields should be null, not omitted
Phone numbers should be normalized to digits only
scenario.exampleInput: Business card text: 'Sarah Chen | VP of Engineering | TechCorp Inc. | sarah.chen@techcorp.com | Mobile: (555) 123-4567'
hints: Specify the exact JSON structure you expect
Tell the AI what to do with missing information
Include an example of the expected output format

rubric.name: JSON Structure
rubric.description: Does the prompt clearly specify valid JSON output?

scoringGuide.excellent: Explicitly requests JSON with example structure shown

rubric.name: Field Specification
rubric.description: Are all required fields clearly defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: All fields listed with types and examples
scoringGuide.good: Fields listed but types not specified

rubric.name: Missing Data Handling
rubric.description: Does the prompt specify how to handle missing data?

scoringGuide.excellent: Explicit null handling with consistent approach

rubric.name: Data Normalization
rubric.description: Does the prompt specify data formatting rules?

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear normalization rules for phone, etc.

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Extract contact information from the following text and return ONLY valid JSON (no other text).

Required JSON structure:
```json
{
  "name": "Full Name",
  "email": "email@example.com",
  "phone": "5551234567",
  "company": "Company Name",
  "title": "Job Title"
}
```

Rules:
- All fields are required in the output
- If a field is not found, use null
- Phone numbers: digits only, no formatting (e.g., "5551234567")
- Email: lowercase
- Name: Title Case

Text to process:
Sarah Chen | VP of Engineering | TechCorp Inc. | sarah.chen@techcorp.com | Mobile: (555) 123-4567
commonMistakes: Not specifying JSON-only output (AI adds explanation)
